pages.text: $(thing)Thinking Fluid$() is the most basic research fluid, used for $(#55FF55)Basic$() tier research.$(br2)It is a $(#00BBFF)cyan-colored$() fluid stored in the Research Station's internal tank (up to 8000 mB = 8 buckets).

pages.title: Recipe
pages.text: Craft from a Water Bucket and 2 Redstone.
